audit_verdict.minimum_next_action: Do not launch Phase 2.5 signal-row regeneration. Either expand disk or make an explicit archive/retention decision for one high-yield completed artifact, then record sha256/size manifest and rerun gates before deletion.
audit_verdict.preferred_next_action: Expand disk to reach at least 25GiB free; if expansion is unavailable, approve one completed LLM2Rec embedding or final model/checkpoint retention decision after confirming no rerun/resume need.
